violations.description: Backflow prevention. — --Direct connection existed between the sewage system and drain originating from equipment in which food, portable equipment/utensils are placed. -Need a physical air gap between drain hose and drain for dishwasher.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Floor edges need more thorough cleaning. -Wall above 3 compartment sink needs cleaned.
Clean, employee dressing area, cleaning equipment storage, living/sleeping quarters separate (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Properly designed, located, constructed, operated, maintained, cleaned and chemical test kit provided (2 pts deducted)
Properly designed, located, constructed, operated, maintained, cleaned and chemical test kit provided (2 pts deducted)
